items.title: 'Most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 18
items.summary: Kyiv's mayor declares a day of mourning after the major drone and missile attack on the Ukrainian capital.

items.title: July Fireworks Include 2 Separate Meteor Showers to Light up the Night Sky Late in the Month
items.summary: With plenty to see across the firmament this month, one event surely stands out for stargazers: when 2 meteor showers bombard the sky over the last nights of July. The first is the Southern Delta Aqua…
